title: 10pc Razor Knife Blade Refill Pack Replacement Blades for 8828 Hobby Knife
description:
Tired of having dull blades for your hobby knife? This set will provide you with 10 brand new razor-sharp blades of different sizes and styles. Each high carbon steel blade is extremely sharp and specially ground and stropped to provide the smoothest possible edge. They are designed to fit Testors 8828 blade holders and come packaged in two plastic safety tubes. Great for modeling, scrap booking, crafting, and hundreds of other uses. Having 10 different sizes and styles means that you'll have the right blade for any application!
